text: Reproduce as the agent's user: `sudo -u monitor /usr/local/bin/healthcheck` → `Permission denied`. Now look at the mode: `ls -l /usr/local/bin/healthcheck`.
It's `-rw-r--r--` (644) — no execute bit for anyone. A script with no `x` bit can't be run directly, not even by root. (Running `sh healthcheck` would work, but the agent execs it directly.)
Add the execute bit: `sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/healthcheck` (makes it 755). Re-test with `sudo -u monitor /usr/local/bin/healthcheck`.
